seo.title: The Best Tint for ASEAN
seo.description: Protecting People, Property and Our Future through Advanced Optical Technology.

data.subhead: Protecting People, Property and Our Future through Advanced Optical Technology.

media.alt: Collage of a protected car, a modern glass building and a woman enjoying sunlight safely

categories.title: Automotive
categories.description: Cooler drives, superior protection and enhanced driving comfort.

categories.title: Residential
categories.description: More comfortable living, lower energy bills and protection for your family.

categories.title: Commercial
categories.description: Improve comfort, increase productivity and achieve your ESG goals.

categories.title: Personal Care
categories.description: UV+420 protection for healthy skin and eyes every day.

categories.title: Sustainability
categories.description: Reduce energy consumption and protect our environment.

pillars.title: Protect People
pillars.description: Blocks harmful UV+420, reduces heat and protects the health of your family, skin and eyes.

pillars.title: Protect Property
pillars.description: Prevents fading, cracks and damage to vehicles, interiors, furniture and valuable assets.

pillars.title: Save Energy
pillars.description: Reduces heat gain and lowers air-conditioning usage, saving energy and costs.

pillars.title: Protect Our Future
pillars.description: Lower energy usage means reduced carbon emissions and a better planet for generations.

pillars.title: Patent UV+420™
pillars.description: Beyond UV400. Comprehensive protection against UVB, UVA, UVA1 and Blue Light (HEV).

pillars.title: 6-Layer Hotmelt™
pillars.description: Stronger, more durable adhesion for long-lasting performance in extreme ASEAN climate.

pillars.title: Multi-Layer Sputtering
pillars.description: Advanced heat rejection technology without interfering with your signal and visibility.

pillars.title: Rigorous Testing
pillars.description: Tested to international standards for optical performance, durability and safety.

pillars.title: Performance Warranty
pillars.description: Backed by our industry-leading warranty for your total peace of mind.

testimonials.quote: Huge difference in heat rejection. My car cools down faster and the interior is well protected. Worth every ringgit!
testimonials.author: Ahmad R.
